title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that enables production-grade cluster deployment with a single click. It abstracts away the complexity of managing control and data planes while allowing customization for advanced users and supports AI workload scaling through integrated features like Karpenter node pools.
